title: FEPITO 20 Pieces White Handheld Paper Fan Paper Folding Fans with Bamboos for Wedding Gift, Party, Home
features: VaLue Pack：20 Pieces folding paper fan in white, sufficient quantity can meet your daily use and replacement
Material: Our handheld paper fan is made of high-quality paper, tough, not easy to tear up. The handle is made of bamboo, hard to break, designed for long-term and repeat use.
Portable Size: each piece of folding fan measures about 8.3 inches/ 21 cm long and 14 inches/ 36 cm wide when keeps open;
Function: these paper fans are blank; you can paint on the surface of the fan according to your own preferences, and give full play to your imagination

Uses: our paper hand fans are suitable for team building activities, holiday parties, picnics, school activities, home decoration, weddings, etc.; they are also ideal gifts for handicraft lovers and friends
